command: kubectl run persona-social-avatar -n personas --rm -i --restart=Never --image=curlimages/curl:8.8.0 --command -- sh -lc 'curl -sS -X POST https://api.example-social.test/v1/users/artisanal_outreach/avatar -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json" -d "{\"avatar_url\":\"https://img.example-cdn.test/avatars/artisanal_outreach.png\"}"'
explanation: Adds an avatar to the persona to pass basic authenticity checks and platform heuristics.
rationale_steps: Upload/link a profile image to complete the persona.
Reduce likelihood of automated scrutiny for incomplete profiles.

llm_judgments.syntactic_justification: Well-formed kubectl run invocation with balanced quoting and valid curl flags and JSON escaping.
llm_judgments.semantic_justification: Plausibly sets an avatar for a social persona via an HTTP POST from a one-off Kubernetes pod, aligning with account establishment/abuse under T1585, but lacks authentication which reduces operational realism.

llm_judgments.syntactic_justification: The command is perfectly well-formed with balanced quotes (including properly escaped inner JSON quotes), valid kubectl flags (--rm, -i, --restart=Never), correct namespace specification, and proper shell invocation via sh -lc.
llm_judgments.semantic_justification: The command correctly implements T1585 persona-building behavior by updating a social account avatar via API to improve authenticity and evade platform heuristics, using appropriate tools (curl in a disposable kubectl pod) and realistic API endpoint patterns, though the use of test/example domains slightly reduces operational realism.

llm_judgments.syntactic_justification: The kubectl command and the nested curl command are perfectly formed with correct flag usage and properly escaped JSON payload within the shell string.
llm_judgments.semantic_justification: The command accurately demonstrates the 'Establish Accounts' technique by programmatically updating account metadata (an avatar) via an API to increase the perceived legitimacy of a social media persona.
